overview: A detective rejects the claim that his daughter took her own life, chasing deadly secrets that lead to baffling questions and shocking truths.

title: Cowgirl
overview: Empar, a 60-year-old farmer, needs her cow Tona to get pregnant to save her farm. After failed attempts, she asks Bernat, owner of the area's largest farm, for help. When Tona conceives, the vet warns of a risky pregnancy.

title: Ask E. Jean
overview: Chronicles E. Jean Carroll's life, trailblazing work and legal battles.

title: WAGER
overview: Cain joined in an illegal underground fight, a fight to the death for a huge money hoping the huge prize will change his life. But in the ring, the contender was his long lost friend. After years separated, they meet on the ring that they cannot leave until the other one is dead.

title: The Last Guest of the Holloway Motel
overview: In 1970s Britain, Tony Powell was a star defender for Norwich City Football Club — until one day he disappeared from the public eye without a word to family or friends. Decades and seemingly a lifetime later, Tony now quietly resides at the Holloway Motel in the heart of West Hollywood as its manager and sole resident (apart from his dog Samantha). However, after he learns the motel is shuttering and he'll soon be evicted, Tony must finally reconcile his past and present in order to survive and come to terms with the multifaceted relationships of his life: those he's found, lost and abandoned.

title: Sleeppers
overview: One day in the life of Angelos and Ioanna, each dealing with last night's fight.

title: Sacrée soirée !
overview: Alban, a confirmed bachelor who no longer believes in love, sees his life turned upside down when he falls for Laetitia, his new neighbor... But the unexpected arrival of his childhood friend Samy, and the interventions of the building manager, throw what was supposed to be a perfect evening into chaos. Filmed on March 18, 2026, at the Théâtre de La Grande Comédie in Paris's 9th arrondissement.

title: The Bowens: A Portrait of an American Family
overview: What does it take to raise an American family today? What kind of values should be instilled into children? Is the future too dangerous, unpredictable and grim? Meet The Bowens - a new kind of American family that decided to take matters into their hands and work together to navigate uncertainties of life through relentless self improvement, strength, discipline, and loyalty.

title: Sarpanch
overview: Dev Kharoud

title: Purushaha
overview: Follows three husbands who, overwhelmed by domestic challenges, initiate a chain of events leading to legal intervention, blending family drama with satire and a quirky superhero-style twist.

title: Dose
overview: A doctor uncovers a suspicious death at his hospital, unraveling secrets and lies. Joined by a haunted investigator, their search for truth becomes a deadly fight for survival.

title: Pickleball Pete
overview: A washed-up tennis player enters a Palm Beach pickleball tournament in order to save his hometown courts from being torn down for a corporate office complex.

title: True Justice: Eye For An Eye
overview: Amateur sleuths tackle a fresh challenge at a local school, diving into the fierce world of parent politics. Their investigation uncovers hidden agendas and unexpected alliances as they navigate the complex web within the community.

title: Josh Johnson: Symphony
overview: In his first HBO comedy special, comedian Josh Johnson debuts original material about our shared experiences as humans – tackling topics like family, religion, and relationships through his unique point of view and signature creativity.

title: Westhampton
overview: Haunted by an accident he caused in high school, a damaged filmmaker is forced to go back to the scene of the tragedy and face the friends whose lives he ruined and a town that disdains him. Jumping between the present and an indie film he made about the accident reveals how the true events played out far differently than depicted in his movie.

title: When I Said I Do
overview: Ali Corley is a widowed search-and-rescue K-9 handler who rebuilt her life after losing her husband in the line of duty. When she meets seasoned rescue specialist Shawn Willis, their connection forces them both to confront the true meaning of commitment.

title: AEW Double or Nothing 2026
overview: The 2026 Double or Nothing was a professional wrestling pay-per-view produced by All Elite Wrestling (AEW) that took place on May 24, 2026, at Louis Armstrong Stadium in New York City, New York, USA. It featured the first quarter-final matches of the 2026 Owen Hart Foundation Tournaments for both the men and women, as well as the long-anticipated AEW International Championship match between Don Callis Family members Kazuchika Okada (c) and Konosuke Takeshita. The show was headlined by Darby Allin (c) vs. MJF in a Title vs. Hair match for the AEW World Championship, where MJF would have to shave his head bald if he lost.

title: Ink Between the Lines
overview: After the devastating suicide of her best friend Coli, 15 year old Natalie turns to journaling to cope with her overwhelming grief. Struggling with guilt and isolation, she pours her emotions onto the page and joins a support group for teens. A deep conversation with Ezra, a friend who understands silent pain, inspires her to transform her journal entries into a novel. As Natalie writes, she begins to confront hidden truths about her friendship with Coli, unspoken struggles, and the weight of what was left unsaid. Through storytelling, she finds healing, connection, and the courage to speak the truth—not just for herself, but for others who need to hear it.

title: 2026 TXT Moa Con in Japan: Live Viewing
overview: A special concert prepared exclusively for MOA to celebrate TOMORROW X TOGETHER's 7th  debut anniversary, [2026 TXT MOA CON]. Experience a powerful live band performance and special solos, showcasing each member’s unique talent.

title: Achilles Returns
overview: After many years, with help of Thetis and negotiations between Zeus and Hades, an aged Achilles is released from the Underworld into a modern world.

title: In The Mire
overview: Years later, the younger brother returns to his abandoned childhood home and the mud-covered ground where memories lie buried. He looks back on the traumatic years of his adolescence. As an adult, he digs up the objects and memories once buried there, continuing his search for a way back to himself.

title: Untold UK: Vinnie Jones
overview: This is the story of Vinnie Jones's rise, fall, and comeback against odds – and red cards – from one of football's most notorious hard men to FA cup winner.

title: Shocktopus
overview: An alien amoeba crashes to Earth and mutates aquatic life along the shores of North Carolina, unleashing an electrified octopus that terrorizes a seaside resort. Two special operatives try to stop the shock wave of cosmic carnage.

title: Golden Bullet
overview: A crime thriller story set in Serbia.

title: Ezma
overview: On Issa's thirty-sixth birthday, after a desperate fight with life that resulted in a crushing defeat, he receives a gift from the last person he expected. A gift that forces him to change every detail of his life. Because he has lost his passion for life and has long been lost to himself, he is forced to follow this new path, undergoing one experience after another, hoping to find what he has lost. As he does so, his current reality battles him; he discovers that he must confront his worst fears. A novel about a different kind of love, about passion, and about the fear that prevents him from feeling alive.

title: No Way to Escape
overview: Five years ago, Lei Ming acted rashly, resulting in the death of his mentor, Lian Ping, in an explosion. Guilt-ridden, he severs ties with his mentor's daughter, Lian Hui, and devotes all his efforts to solving the case in order to comfort the deceased.

title: Kattalan
overview: Power-hungry forces clash in the Ivory cartel war-a fierce story of control, vengeance, and survival where compassion vanishes and only the ruthless endure.

title: 7 Dogs
overview: Interpol agent Khalid Al-Azzazi joins forces with Ghali Abu Dawood from the 7 Dogs crime syndicate to fight drug trafficking.

title: Colony
overview: Professor Se-jeong is thrust into a bloody nightmare when a rapidly mutating virus is released during a biotech conference causing authorities to seal the facility. Trapped inside with no escape, Se-jeong along with a small group of survivors must fight to stay alive while the infected undergo horrific transformations.

title: Tuner
overview: A talented piano tuner's life is turned upside down when he discovers that his meticulous skills for tuning pianos can equally be applied to cracking safes.

title: Dance of the Damned
overview: Darso, a clown busker, lost his wife and unborn child to thug violence. In grief, he brought his wife's body back to his village. However, the village is in chaos due to a conflict with an evil developer and a curse ritual that summons dark forces. Darso is also caught up in the evil forces connected to the person he loves most.

title: Kylie: Tension Tour Live
overview: It's time to hit the dancefloor as pop superstar Kylie Minogue shares a vibrant, exclusive behind-the-scenes look at her smash 2025 Tension World Tour.

title: Mata
overview: Wounded while on a clandestine operation in Niger, French secret agent Mata loses track of her colleague Antoine, captured on the spot. Upon her return, she volunteers for a counter-espionage mission in the Alps, with the intuition that this new assignment might somehow be connected to her traumatic mission in Africa. Haunted by Antoine’s captivity and convinced that her managers are hiding information from her, Mata embarks on a race against time, outside any official framework... at the risk of losing everything.

title: Zombeid
overview: A couple Stuck in a down park on Chand Raat with zombies, must keep them contained to save Eid.

title: Crescendo
overview: Behind the scenes of an ambitious staging of the opera The Marriage of Figaro, an accusation of sexual assault emerges, upsetting the balance of the cast. The film explores the tensions linked to generational conflicts and individual stances, in an artistic context in crisis.

title: Children of Heaven
overview: Two siblings, Ali and Zahra, who agreed to keep the matter of Zahra's missing shoes a secret, which Ali had brought in for repair. To solve the problem, they decided to share Ali's worn-out shoes. Zahra would wear them in the morning during her school schedule, and after returning home, she would run as fast as she could so Ali could wear them to school in the afternoon. New hope emerged when Ali learned of an inter-school running competition with a prize of a pair of shoes for the third-place winner. Ali signed up, determined to win the competition so he could buy Zahra new shoes.

title: Strung
overview: A talented violinist whose prestigious new role as a music tutor for an enigmatic, elite family spirals into a psychological battle for her safety and sanity.

title: Five Friends 2: Mount Klawih
overview: Three years after climbing Mount Madyopuro, the five friends' friendship has grown stronger. When they reunite for Andrew's daughter's birthday, they witness the family threatened with becoming a sacrifice for a black magic ritual! They set off to accompany Andrew to Mount Klawih. However, Juna has disappeared into the realm of demons!

title: Us in the End
overview: Cisco and Cheska, a long-term couple, embark on a final "break-up trip" to decide whether to let go or fight for their relationship after years of growing apart due to conflicting ambitions.

title: It’s All Good
overview: After taking care of his intrusive mother for years, Elie is relieved: she is cured. He can finally focus on his own life and falls in love… until his mom’s relapse. Now he has to take care of both the women in his life!

title: Richard Madeley: Inside the World's Mega Prison
overview: Broadcaster Richard Madeley gains access inside one of the most controversial prisons in the world, El Salvador's Centro de Confinamiento del Terrorismo.

title: Mr. Shota's Last Business Trip
overview: Shota, a machinist who dedicated his life to his work, prepares for his final business trip to Korea before retiring. Meanwhile, Daesung heads to Japan to win back his ex-girlfriend. The two men happen to meet at a ramen shop on the first day of their journeys. When Shota's resignation letter and Daesung's love letter are swapped, an unexpected story begins.

title: Chum
overview: A newlywed couple joins friends on a Mediterranean yacht excursion, only to find themselves caught between a predatory shark and a psychopathic killer in their midst-transforming a sun-drenched escape into a fight for survival.

title: Sold to Death
overview: When a realtor's celebrity clients start turning up dead, she becomes the suspect in a string of murders that trace back to a buried family secret.

title: Suamiku Lukaku
overview: Amina, a devoted mother living a difficult life, married to Irfan, a man admired in public but feared at home.  As their daughter Nadia’s condition worsens and her life is at risk, Amina is forced to endure abuse and fear every day, with no one truly seeing her pain.  When she meets Zahra, a brave women’s rights lawyer, a chance to break free begins to appear. But freedom comes at a cost. In a world where truth has a price, how far will a mother go to protect her child?

title: To the Tooth
overview: Artie is a young Italian chef who runs a bistro that used to be owned by her father. When the dead body of an ex-mafioso appears in the restaurant, Artie must re-evaluate her relationship with both L'Atessa and the people in it.

title: Penny in the Sky
overview: When a man contemplating his life decides to put his fate into a coin toss, he's interrupted by the sudden appearance of a woman there to end her life as well. Now they both find themselves at a crossroads, life and death decided by heads or tails.

title: Blast
overview: Follows a family trained to protect the powerless who become the most dangerous obstacle of all.

title: The Breadwinner
overview: After his wife Katie lands a once-in-a-lifetime deal on Shark Tank that takes her on a prolonged business trip - lifelong breadwinner Nate Wilcox now has to fend for his family as a first-time stay-at-home dad.

title: The Legend Hunters
overview: The story follows the team as they try to raid a tomb made by master tomb raiders. It is set partially in Russia and will involve scenes at Catherine Palace in St. Petersburg.

title: Roid
overview: A solitary middle aged man marries a madwoman and builds a house on a vacant plot of land far from the village. However, his wife’s madness becomes a calamity in his tranquil life.

title: No Good Men
overview: 2021, Afghanistan right before the Taliban’s return. Naru, the only camerawoman at Kabul’s main TV station, struggles to keep custody of her three-year-old son after leaving her serial cheater husband. Convinced no good men exist in her country, Naru is caught off guard when Qodrat, Kabul TV’s most important journalist, gives her a career opportunity. As the two crisscross the city reporting on its last days of freedom, sparks fly and Naru starts to doubt herself: could there actually be a good man out there?

title: Haunted Universities 4
overview: The tales from four regions of Thailand. Stories handed down "from generation to generation" still told to this day: North – Northeast – Central – South.

title: Polong
overview: Maria Hadi tried to seek forgiveness before she died, but her defense team vented their grudge against the innocent heir.

title: Susana and Elvira: No Plan B
overview: Susana and Elvira, two former best friends, reunite after two years apart to organize the celebrity wedding of the year.

title: National Theatre Live: The Playboy of the Western World
overview: Pegeen Flaherty’s life is turned upside down when a young man walks into her pub claiming that he’s killed his father. Instead of being shunned, the killer becomes a local hero and begins to win hearts, that is until a second man unexpectedly arrives on the scene...

title: The Abyss
overview: Dasha and Sasha are a happy newlywed. A honeymoon and a parachute jump over the foothills of Mount Elbrus are supposed to be the beginning of their new life. But fate intervenes. The pilot turns out to be Artyom - Dasha's ex, a man she didn't even want to remember. When the plane crashes, the three are forced to jump without training. The lines get tangled. They miraculously survive - but find themselves suspended over a mountain abyss amid raging forest fires. Dasha finds herself between two men, each of whom is tied to her life. One is the present. The other is an unhealed past.

title: How to Save the Immortal. The Mystery of Living Water
overview: Three hundred years of Koshchey's search for a chosen one have finally been crowned with success, and preparations for the wedding with Varvara are in full swing. However, his cherished dream will not come true so easily, and now Koshchey, along with the Good fellow Elisha and Kolobok, embarks on a dangerous journey to save his beloved.

title: Karakkam
overview: A drunken New Year's prank goes horribly wrong when two young men remove sacred crosses from graves. Five restless ghosts emerge to haunt their every move, driving them to seek redemption and release.

title: Treat Her Like a Lady
overview: When single mother Sandra, full of unwavering energy, is evicted from her apartment by the Dutch government due to fraud, she convinces her daughters Harrie and Stella that their emergency shelter is a holiday hotel. Taking care of her children while being the main breadwinner seems impossible, but Sandra won't go down without a fight: with heroism and creativity, she gives her daughters the best summer of their lives.

title: The Furious
overview: When YouTuber-boxer Danial insults their late father's name, brothers Firdaus and Hakim reunite - one fighting for redemption, the other for revenge - in a battle that will decide not just who wins, but what remains of The Furious legacy.

title: BURNED
overview: A THIEF DID SOMETHING IN HIS PAST BUT IT IS SLOWLY CATCHING UP TO HIM & HE DOESN'T KNOW WHAT TO DO NEXT...

title: Copan
overview: In the heart of São Paulo, the Copan building houses more than five thousand residents and becomes the stage for a heated election. The building manager, who has held the position for 30 years, fights to keep his job, while an even bigger dispute unfolds outside the building's walls, with Lula and Jair Bolsonaro vying for the presidency of Brazil.

title: Tod meiner Jugend
overview: A janitor with a loving wife and a devoted son leads a seemingly quiet, orderly life. One day, the boy asks his father an inconspicuous but profound question: “Dad, why are there no photos of you at my age?” Driven by a restlessness that can no longer be suppressed, the man returns to the place of his childhood: a children's home he has avoided for decades.

title: Rockstar
overview: A rising music star faces fame, love, and identity in a journey that changes his life forever.

title: Paikar
overview: An Iranian expat journeys back to his homeland, where he must face his domineering father and grapple with complex emotions about family ties, cultural identity, and his place in the world.

title: Hope
overview: After doom-scrolling on social media, a young poet named Salome Agbaroji is thrust into a fantastic journey through a magical animated realm, where she encounters a majestic Black Crowned Crane.

title: Office of Magical Forces
overview: 11-year-old Yurko and Mia accidentally stumble upon a mysterious entrance to Otherworldly Kyiv, which has existed since 482. Funny mystical characters come to life in the center of a modern metropolis, and the main characters find themselves in the midst of magical adventures.

title: PULSE
overview: In the world of ego, money, and fashion, a creative on the fringes of the music scene is torn between family and his ambition, leaving him to decide whether to betray his brother to achieve success.

title: Masud Rana
overview: Based on Qazi Anwar Hussain's novel series Masud Rana aka MR-9.

title: In Case We Never Meet Again
overview: Amid the war in Ukraine, Tanya and Zenit’s fragile love story unfolds, stretched between moments of closeness and conflict. Meanwhile, a group of children play war, building block posts, and imagining futures defined by violence.

title: Return
overview: The film tells the story of antelope Hardy, who embarks on a difficult journey of self-cultivation in order to fight against the wolves that threaten the group after the death of his father.

title: Tired of Being a Nerd
overview: During college, a nerd is unjustly accused of the disappearance and supposed murder of a classmate. Twenty years later, he convinces his best friend to go with him to his graduation reunion party to confront all the insecurities, anxieties, and ghosts that haunt his past.

title: Chardikala
overview: The film follows story of Bibi Bimal Kaur a mother and a wife who is falsely implicated in a major incident, leading to her being abandoned by society. She finds refuge in Punjab, where she moves from being a victim to a leader, ultimately

title: Miss You, Love You
overview: A blunt, grieving widow is forced to plan her husband’s funeral with a total stranger: her estranged gay son’s gay assistant. As they fumble through grief and their strange, darkly funny circumstances, buried secrets and long-held resentments surface, but their partnership becomes an unlikely conduit for connection, laughter, and healing for this mother and her unexpected surrogate son.

title: Mononoke the Movie: Chapter III - The Curse of the Serpent
overview: Peace returns to Edo Castle's Ooku, but ominous signs persist. The Medicine Seller uncovers the origins of a deadly conspiracy rooted in a 150-year-old secret involving the Ooku's creation, ancient grudges, and hidden truths. He faces the powerful serpent god, embodying the Ooku's dark history, risking everything to stop it.

title: Phool Pishi O Edward
overview: In a zamindar household, a watchful aunt becomes the quiet witness to a mystery that slowly exposes injustice.

title: Pitfall
overview: After a young man is separated from his friends in the woods, he falls into a ten-foot deep pit of spikes, impaling him through his leg and leaving him trapped. He quickly learns that his fall was not an accident.

title: Time and Water
overview: Facing the death of his country’s glaciers and the loss of his beloved grandparents, Icelandic writer Andri Snær Magnason turns his archives into a time capsule to hold what is slipping away — family, memory, time, and water.

title: Alien Disclosure Day
overview: The U.S. sends miners to excavate a distant planet. As they return, they unknowingly pick up alien stowaways. The ship loses communication with Earth, and a response team is sent to board the ship. Before dying, the team sends a message saying the ship is infested with aliens. Shortly after, escape pods land on Earth. Aliens exit and begin a human killing spree. The infested ship cannot be shot down, but a second response team manages to board. Now, they must figure out how to self-destruct the ship and rescue any survivors before humanity is completely wiped out.

title: Primal Darkness
overview: Cole Harrington, the host of a popular outdoor series, sets out to track down the predator responsible for a series of cattle attacks in rural Nevada. The mystery deepens when he uncovers footage depicting the final moments of two missing university employees.

title: Tokyo Burst
overview: Japanese remake of South Korean film "The Outlaws"(2017)

title: That Burning House
overview: At Home of Happiness, a devoted social worker struggles to reform troubled youth while the institution falls into crisis. A bullied boy clings to his late mother’s teddy bear as his world collapses. A former resident, lured into a telecom scam, faces a moral dilemma that threatens his life. Across different paths, each must confront the scars of the past and decide whether to fall into darkness or fight for a way forward.

title: Return of the Jungle
overview: Nine year old Mihir and his friends are faced with the daunting task of outwitting the biggest, meanest bully in school, Rahul Malhotra. To help them ride through this impossible journey, they turn to Thatha and his fantastic tales of inspiration from the ancient Jungles of India. Together, they must build a ruthless dinosaur, fight a nerve- racking game of cricket and travel all the way to Rajasthan, to rediscover the power of friendship, compassion and determination.

title: Moss & Freud
overview: Supermodel Kate Moss embarks on a journey of self-discovery when acclaimed artist Lucian Freud offers to paint her portrait.

title: Phera
overview: Two men share a house and a past that no longer fits them. As city life pulls Palash forward and age holds his father Pannalal in place, an unexpected return forces them to confront their differences and the quiet truths they have avoided.

title: Nothing Personal
overview: Lina, a well-known TV host, appears at Pedro’s doorstep to confront him about a cruel message he posted about her online. What begins as a showdown soon turns into an awkward living arrangement that quietly reshapes them both.

title: Forastera
overview: Cata will see her summer vacation disrupted by the absurd and sudden death of her grandmother, which only she witnesses. Her grief shifts when she casually turns to play pretend, transforming into the deceased. What begins with a game of dress-up will blur the lines of reality and family roles.

title: Mallorca Confidencial
overview: Mallorca, 2007. La Chusa, the matriarch of a shantytown, runs the drug market with the support of neighbors, traffickers, and police. But when she suffers a massive robbery, she sees her power and her family shaken.

title: Our Land
overview: Through organised 'mass trespass' events, the Right to Roam movement sets out to increase public access to nature, but finds itself in conflict with England's landowners.

title: Ninja Wars - BlackFox vs Shogun's Ninja
overview: Rikka Isurugi (Chihiro Yamamoto), head of the Fox Clan, is investigating the "White Lotus," a mysterious cult suspected of plotting a rebellion against the Shogunate. During her mission, she encounters Okyo (Kanon Miyahara), a Fuma Ninja dispatched by the Shogun. Their paths converge as they face a formidable common enemy: the Iga Ninja clan, led by Hattori Hanzo (Kane Kosugi), who harbors a deep vengeance against the Tokugawa family. A three-way conflict between the Fox Clan, Fuma Ninja, and Iga Ninja is about to begin.

title: Goodbye, My Loved Ones!
overview: A bride-to-be’s careless remark sparks chaos between two families, putting her wedding in jeopardy.

title: Runner
overview: Cris dedicates herself body and soul to athletics. While preparing for the 800-meter race at the Spanish National Championships, she suffers a severe psychotic break brought on by mounting pressure. As recovery unfolds, Cris keeps her eyes fixed on the track, holding on to the dream that has always defined.

title: Melodrama
overview: After her husband’s death, Sonia is forced to shrink her life, trading her sprawling family home for a cramped, unfamiliar apartment. In this state of displacement, her world is a quiet hum of grief and rigid routines, until she hears the rhythm of a neighboring construction site. There she meets Aimé, a Haitian worker whose presence awakens a dormant yet intense desire. Their connection is swift and tender, yet their romance exists in a crossfire.

title: Top Cop
overview: A London-based girl dies after falling from a balcony during a wedding in Punjab. Declared brought dead, her death sparks a murder probe. With 20 suspects and buried secrets, the wedding turns into a deadly game of truth and lies.

title: Daydream
overview: A young adult recounts childhood memories involving his 6th grade teacher and the lessons she taught, particularly her unconventional assignment: to daydream.

title: Where the Heart Lands
overview: A Kentucky horse trainer's world is upended when a handsome LA lawyer inherits her stable. To stop him from selling, she and the locals drag him into the excitement of horse racing, finding love along the way.

title: 钟馗
overview: A girl meets Zhong Kui, the deity who vanquishes ghosts and demons. Partnering to solve cases, they discover a great conspiracy against the mortal realm.

title: Haunted Harmony Mysteries: Key to the Castle
overview: When a ghost hunter show comes to town, it's up to Gethsemane and Eamon to solve the unexpected murder of the host, allowing the brand-new spirit to cross-over.

title: Borley Rectory: The Awakening
overview: In 1900, young Reverend Henry Bull and his sister, Kitty, are tasked with taking over the duties of their family home in Essex, a majestic Victorian mansion built on the site of an old monastery. Unaware of the sinister forces that lurk within, the pair are soon confronted by terrifying paranormal activities that threaten their loved ones. Desperate to protect themselves from the demonic intrusion, they call upon the services of a trusted family friend to investigate the origins of the vengeful ghosts which haunt their property. But these are spirits who will not rest, and Borley Rectory is doomed to gain a chilling reputation, as the most haunted house in all of Britain.

title: Instadocs: Alex Murdaugh, Unconvicted
overview: Why was Alex Murdaugh's conviction overturned? The debut of "Instadocs" digs into stunning allegations of jury interference in his double murder trial.

title: Human Hibachi 3: The Last Supper
overview: A man who suffers from hyper-religiosity, leads a cult of devout followers to partake in a "last supper" where sacrificed humans are the main course.

title: The Lounge
overview: Unfairly overlooked employee Liz wants to become a successful corporate creature.

title: AAA Noche de Los Grandes 2026
overview: Noche de Los Grandes (Spanish for "Night of the Greats") is an upcoming professional wrestling event produced by the Mexican professional wrestling promotion Lucha Libre AAA Worldwide (AAA), in partnership with its parent company WWE. The event will take place on Saturday, May 30, 2026, at Arena Monterrey in Monterrey, Nuevo León, Mexico.

title: Girl Dad
overview: A tough, queer teenager leaves Brooklyn for the first time to spend the summer with her estranged, struggling composer father in Los Angeles. The two are forced to reconnect over a used refrigerator, that nearly upends and further strains their father-daughter relationship in the process.

title: The 51st AFI Life Achievement Award: A Tribute to Eddie Murphy
overview: Follows the 51st AFI Life Achievement Award ceremony honoring Eddie Murphy for his five-decade career in film, television and stand-up comedy.

title: Revolutionary America
overview: The story of the American Founding, the greatest political achievement in history. The American colonists had developed a unique way of life as they practiced self-government for 150 years. In the struggles between the colonies and the mother country that followed the French and Indian War, Britain declared that Americans had no right to rule themselves. This went against everything the Americans knew. In response, our ancestors risked their “lives, fortunes, and sacred honor” to fight the War for Independence. Against all odds, they won, and in victory formed a stable, lasting republic.

title: A Toast to Us
overview: The struggles and bravery of modern women balancing family, love, and self-worth, encouraging them to stop crying for others, embrace self-love, and celebrate every meaningful moment in life.
